reviews.author: Timothy Kaspar
reviews.text: I had a persistent roof leak for several years that was extremely difficult to locate. Two other roofing companies couldn't find the source. Both simply recommended replacing the entire roof. Landon approached the problem completely differently. He sent a crew out to carefully patch all of the most likely problem areas instead of pushing a full replacement. Excellent value, honest work, and outstanding service.

reviews.author: Coach Sis
reviews.text: Landon was top notch. He made everything easy and checked in with me along the way for a total roof replacement I needed done. I can't say enough about the job they did for my mom's house. She needed a new roof badly. Thank you for being an honest and fair roofing contractor who lived up to every inch of what was promised.

reviews.author: Stephen Tolpinrud
reviews.text: Landon, the owner, is a pleasure to work with. He's forthright, a good communicator, and is fair with pricing. Frame Roofing Utah re-roofed 2 of our buildings and the final product looks great. Plus, the work was done efficiently and cleanly — my yard and gardens look like they did before we re-roofed.

reviews.author: Chris Chatzis
reviews.text: High quality workmanship by his crew, cleaned up every nail and garbage. Communicated throughout the process and made sure we were happy before he got paid.

reviews.author: Marie Conroe
reviews.text: Frame Roofing Utah did an excellent job replacing our casitas roof in only one day. The crew was very efficient, respectful, and clean. I highly recommend this company to anyone needing a new roof, as their work is of high quality and they are trustworthy people.

reviews.author: Sam Thornton
reviews.text: Working with Landon was a breeze. He was knowledgeable and provided me with excellent advice on the best options for our new roof. His pricing came in at just over a third of a bid we received from another company. The crew did excellent work, completed our roof in a single day, and left the property clean afterward.

reviews.author: Rick Rekoutis
reviews.text: Landon is great to work with. He has replaced two roofs for me and does top notch work. He should be your first call if you need a roofer.
